tests.name: test_no_matches
test_detects_anagram
tests.message:
run_test.v:12: fn test_detects_anagram
   > assert find_anagrams('listen', candidates) == expected
     Left value: []
    Right value: ['inlets']
tests.test_code:
candidates := ['enlists', 'google', 'inlets', 'banana']
expected := ['inlets']
assert find_anagrams('listen', candidates) == expected
